tagline: Paper That Cut You: Internalize The Noise.
liner: Step into a world where paranoia becomes your own worst enemy. This track fuses early-2000s rap-rock bounce with modern industrial production to create a mid-tempo groove driven by heavy live drums, distorted guitar stabs, and sub-bass pressure. Aggressive turntable scratches glitch out against pitch drops as the narrator battles an inner voice that wounds from within. The journey moves from eerie whispers of self-dimmed reality to explosive rock aggression where you confront the shadow at your back. It is a psychological warfare anthem about teaching fear to lie and breathing right under someone's skin, proving that sometimes the darkest voices are the ones we invited in ourselves.
worldCaption: A glitched industrial wasteland where shadows spin inside static minds amidst heavy bass pressure and distorted guitar stabs.

bios.lead: Channels anxious male rap verses with explosive rock chorus vocals.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.
bios.perc: Delivers chaotic looping patterns that drive frantic denial forward.
bios.bass: Applies sub-bass pressure deep inside every thought and feeling.
bios.synth: Generates glitch edits and pitch drops for mental distortion effects.
bios.other: Layers aggressive scratches to create a paranoid industrial atmosphere.
bios.guitar: Dismantles calm with distorted stabs that cut like paper.
